title: Urban blooms
caption: Tom McCall Waterfront Park, Portland, Oregon, United States
copyright: Cherry blossoms at Tom McCall Waterfront Park, Portland, Oregon, United States (© Eric Vogt/Tandem Stills + Motion)
description: Tom McCall Waterfront Park, a 36-acre (15-hectare) urban oasis along the Willamette River in Portland, Oregon in the United States, is one of the city's most beloved green spaces. Each spring—typically from mid-March to early April—it transforms into a sea of soft pink and white as cherry blossoms bloom. These vibrant trees along scenic walking paths offer a peaceful escape in the heart of the city. The park also features notable landmarks like Salmon Street Springs, an interactive fountain with numerous water jets and the Portland Saturday Market, a favourite local destination.
